roa.docketEntryComment: PD ATC FOR MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: BRUCE CAULDRON APPEARS WITH ANTHONY MIZIKO FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/NP/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL: 25000/X: NO CITE/BWNUM: 1ST/X: 3 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 11-03-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X: THE CONDITION OF ACM RELEASE IS THEDEFENDANT SHALL POSESS NO WEAPONS,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: STATUS OF GPS DEVICE AND PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/TE: 25 MINUTES/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RECALL/BWR: 11-03-21  /BWR1/EMTERM/MO PC 1385: PLEATO OTHER CHARGE/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF GPS/X: THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
